prompt: Create a photorealistic lifestyle image of a cute compact retro-futuristic electric hatchback in pale mint green parked on a sunny coastal road beside a sparkling blue ocean. A young woman with short blonde hair stands leaning casually against the passenger side near the front door, wearing a light mint green short summer dress with a matching cardigan and beige platform sandals; her face is softly anonymized/blurred. The car has rounded bubble-like styling, smooth glossy paint, large rounded windows, cream interior seats, a brown steering wheel and dashboard, covered rear wheel arches, circular aero wheel covers, subtle chrome trim, and a friendly cute design. Compose the scene in a wide horizontal 3:2 frame with the car filling most of the left and center, the woman on the right, ocean horizon in the background, bright midday sunlight, crisp reflections on the bodywork, shallow realistic depth, clean vacation mood, high-end automotive photography, natural colors, realistic proportions, no text, no logos emphasized.
